name: tas-v70-20-1-aurora-member-foundation
description: Telemetry Assurance Studio v70.20.1 AURORA Member Foundation — protected command centre with edition and paid-member workspace

scripts.build:cloudflare: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run build:app && npm run prepare:cloudflare-dist
scripts.test:regression: npm run test:inherited && npm run build:editions && npm run test:sprint1 && npm run test:sprint2 && npm run test:member-foundation && npm run test:browser-contract
scripts.validate: npm run build:cloudflare && npm run test:inherited && npm run build:editions && npm run test:sprint1 && npm run test:sprint2 && npm run test:member-foundation && npm run test:browser-contract && npm run write:validation-report && npm run write:member-validation && npm run prepare:cloudflare-dist
scripts.build:community: vite build editions/community --base ./ --outDir ../../dist-editions/community --emptyOutDir && node scripts/write-edition-manifest.cjs community
scripts.build:professional: vite build editions/professional --base ./ --outDir ../../dist-editions/professional --emptyOutDir && node scripts/write-edition-manifest.cjs professional
scripts.build:consultant: vite build editions/consultant --base ./ --outDir ../../dist-editions/consultant --emptyOutDir && node scripts/write-edition-manifest.cjs consultant
scripts.build:editions: npm run build:community && npm run build:professional && npm run build:consultant
scripts.test:inherited: npm run test:parity && npm run test:v70 && npm run test:commercial-parity && npm run test:visible-input && npm run test:golden-compare && npm run test:left-navigation && npm run test:professional-layout && npm run test:compact-panes && npm run test:original-pane-parity && npm run test:desktop-viewport && npm run test:customer-before-after && npm run test:redundancy-clean && npm run test:output-friendly && npm run test:premium-golden-assurance && npm run test:event-intel && npm run test:sortable-event-table && npm run test:event-source-column && npm run test:event-column-order && npm run test:standalone-direct-deploy && npm run test:aurora && npm run test:deploy-runner && npm run test:project-separation && npm run test:repository-copy && npm run test:foundation-lock
scripts.test:sprint1: npm run test:entitlements && npm run test:edition-builds && npm run test:commercial-foundation
scripts.test:sprint2: npm run test:community-engine && npm run test:community-report && npm run test:community-product
